channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Trump suggests he could replace Freedom 250 performers at D.C. rally
item.description: President Donald Trump proposed on Saturday that he might step in for performers who have pulled out of next month's Freedom 250 event in Washington.

item.title: Anti-ICE protester charged with biting officers during Delaney Hall unrest
item.description: A New Jersey man accused of kicking and biting federal deportation officers during riots at Delaney Hall in Newark now faces federal assault charges.

item.title: Jill Biden's comments on Hunter pardon and who she blames are hard to believe
Conservative judges compete for Trump's next court nomination
item.description: A rising number of conservative federal appeals judges are issuing opinions seen as auditions for the next Supreme Court seat, even though...
